---
title: "RAW GENE COUNTS-  STARsolo to MARVEL/ for MSS CRC data"
---

```{r}
# Packages for single-cell processing and matrix handling
library(SingCellaR)
library(data.table)
library(plyr)
library(Matrix)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
```

## Load integrated metadata (SingCellaR object)
```{r}
# Path to integrated object (filtered high-quality cells)
path <- "~/Desktop/stage_M2/integrate_marvel/SingCellaR_output/"
file <- "Integrated_samples_MSS.rdata"

load(file = paste(path, file, sep = ""))

# Extract metadata (validated cells)
df.pheno <- object@meta.data
```


### Function to process one sample

```{r}
process_sample <- function(sample_id, base_path) {
  
  # Path to STARsolo output
  path <- paste(base_path, sample_id, "/Gene/filtered/", sep = "")
  
  # Initialize SingCellaR object
  object.2 <- new("SingCellaR")
  object.2@dir_path_10x_matrix <- path
  object.2@sample_uniq_id <- ""
  
  # Load matrix
  load_matrices_from_cellranger(object.2, cellranger.version = 3)
  
  # Extract cell IDs
  cell.ids <- colnames(object.2)
  
  df.pheno.2 <- data.frame(
    "cell.id." = cell.ids,
    "cell.id" = paste(cell.ids, sample_id, sep = ""),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Find overlap with validated cells (SingCellaR filtering)
  overlap <- intersect(df.pheno$Cell, df.pheno.2$cell.id)
  
  print(paste(sample_id, ":", length(overlap), "cells kept"))
  
  # Subset cells
  df.pheno.2.small <- df.pheno.2[df.pheno.2$cell.id %in% overlap, ]
  
  # Extract count matrix
  df <- counts(object.2)
  df.small <- df[, df.pheno.2.small$cell.id.]
  
  # Rename columns (important for downstream)
  colnames(df.small) <- df.pheno.2.small$cell.id
  
  return(df.small)
}
```


### Process all samples
```{r}
# Base directory containing STARsolo outputs
base_path <- "~/mnt/storage/Fastq_single_cell_atlas_pelka_et_al/Cellranger_starSolo_out/"

# List of samples
samples <- c(
  "SRR15652831", "SRR15652834", "SRR15652835",
  "SRR15652836", "SRR15652837", "SRR15652850",
  "SRR15652851", "SRR15652852", "SRR15652853",
  "SRR15652854", "SRR15652871", "SRR15653024",
  "SRR15653116", "SRR15653117", "SRR15653120",
  "SRR15653121", "SRR15653122"
)

# Apply function to all samples
list_matrices <- lapply(samples, process_sample, base_path = base_path)

# Name list elements
names(list_matrices) <- samples
```



## Merge all samples

```{r}
# Combine all matrices (genes x cells)
df.merged <- do.call(cbind, list_matrices)

# Check dimensions
dim(df.merged)
class(df.merged)
```

## Export for MARVEL

```{r}
# Output directory
path_out <- "~/Desktop/stage_M2/integrate_marvel/MARVEL_input/Gene_STARsolo_MSS/"

### 1. Count matrix
writeMM(df.merged, file = paste(path_out, "matrix_counts.mtx", sep = ""))

### 2. Cell metadata
df.pheno.merged <- data.frame(cell.id = colnames(df.merged))

write.table(
  df.pheno.merged,
  paste(path_out, "phenoData.txt", sep = ""),
  sep = "\t",
  col.names = TRUE,
  row.names = FALSE,
  quote = FALSE
)

### 3. Gene metadata
df.feature.merged <- data.frame(gene_short_name = rownames(df.merged))

write.table(
  df.feature.merged,
  paste(path_out, "featureData.txt", sep = ""),
  sep = "\t",
  col.names = TRUE,
  row.names = FALSE,
  quote = FALSE
)
```
